node_types.label: Design strategy
node_types.description: A strategy for building to leverage some ecosystem service. From the list: 'Rooftop garden', 'Vertical greenery system', 'Blue-green roof'. description of implementation should be specific: e.g. for a vertical greenery system the size, species and amount of plants used, their exposure (north,south,east,west) etc.

node_types.label: Ecosystem service
node_types.description: A benefit humans derive from the ecosystem. From the list: 'Regulation of temperature', 'Regulation of water quality', 'provision of habitat'

node_types.label: Building
node_types.description: A building in which a certain design strategy was employed.

node_types.label: Product
node_types.description: A commercial product employing a given design strategy. Note which company creates the product and where this company is based.

relationship_types.label: EVIDENCE
relationship_types.description: Evidence of how the employment of a certain design strategy supports a certain ecosystem service. Only use claims demonstrated in the paper you are currently reading (no second hand sources). The source should be the name of the current paper.

relationship_types.label: BUILDING_EMPLOYS_STRAT
relationship_types.description: Whether a building employs a certain design strategy

relationship_types.label: PRODUCT_EMPLOYS_STRAT
relationship_types.description: Whether a product employs a certain design strategy

relationship_types.label: BUILDING_EMPLOYS_PRODUCT
relationship_types.description: Whether a building employs a certain commercial product
